headline: Shortwave Radio Daily Briefing - March 15, 2024
highlights: BBC World Service English 17:00-18:00 UTC on 6.195 kHz with strong African coverage
Voice of America News Now 14:00-15:00 UTC on 9.455 kHz targeting Asia-Pacific region
Radio France Internationale 19:00-20:00 UTC on 11.655 kHz with Central African focus
Deutsche Welle German Service 20:00-21:00 UTC on 6.140 kHz with excellent European reception
changes: WRNO New Orleans suspended operations indefinitely; listeners should tune 7.395 kHz slot to Radio New Zealand International
China Radio International added weekend Mandarin service on 5.960 kHz 08:00-09:00 UTC Saturdays and Sundays
propagation_note: F2 layer ionization near maximum; expect excellent long-distance propagation on 5-7 MHz band throughout afternoon hours. Higher frequencies (15+ MHz) best 11:00-16:00 UTC. Solar activity index K=3, favorable for DX listening.
